name: Lean Body Mass Calculator
seo_description: Use the free Lean Body Mass Calculator to get precise results in seconds. Simply enter your measurements — no registration required.
result_context: The mass magra represents tejido not graso; values more altos indican greater musculatura to the weight.
formula_display: Hombre: LBM = 0.407 × weight + 0.267 × height - 19.2; Mujer: LBM = 0.252 × weight + 0.473 × height - 48.3
steps: Enter weight in kg and height in cm
The results mass libre of grasa in kg
mistakes: Confusing mass magra with mass muscular (includes huesos, órganos, water)
Use formula to atleta siendo sedentario (sobreestima LBM)
Not considering hydration (deshidratación reduces LBM aparente)
desc: Free online lean body mass calculator (boer). Enter weight and height to get instant results.
